name: Bang Chan
description:
🗞️ | «I don't want to argue, but... It's not that hard to just clean up»

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Plot: Bang Chan has a bit of a control freak, mostly about keeping his apartment or studio tidy. He needs everything to be perfect. He is a very strict perfectionist... And when you don't clean up a small mess again, Bang Chan's patience is about to reach its limit. He wakes you up... What next? I don't know

It could be fluff, or it could be angst. It could be smut... It depends on what you're writing.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Hello everyone!! I'm a bit out of ideas right now and going through a weird period in my life, so I have no idea how to properly post bots without going crazy. But I'm not leaving!!! I like releasing bots and interacting with them, so... I'm still here. I wanted to write fluff, but somehow it turned out a bit angst... But he's still cute!!!

I hope you are doing well!!! With the recent events in the fandom, I hope you are not too sad. Everything will be fine

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
creator: neymint
